signals.raw: Based on the search results provided, there is no single confirmed announcement or resolution that has just occurred to move prediction markets. However, the most significant recent developments are:

signals.headline: Most Recent Update:**
signals.raw:
Most Recent Update:**
Fed March FOMC Minutes Reveal Rate Hold Stance | NO rate hike imminent | HIGH confidence[3] – The March FOMC minutes showed some participants discussed potential rate hikes if inflation exceeds 2%, but CME FedWatch reflected a 98.4% probability of a rate hold at the April FOMC meeting, with Fed Chair Powell maintaining a cautious stance regarding energy-related inflation.
matched_markets: Kevin Warsh confirmed as Fed Chair by May 15?

signals.headline: South Korea Inflation Context (Not Today's News):**
signals.raw:
South Korea Inflation Context (Not Today's News):**
South Korea's March inflation came in at 2.2% year-on-year[1], with core inflation at 2.2%[1]. Standard Chartered has revised inflation projections upward due to oil price pressures[2]. J.P. Morgan expects the Bank of Korea to remain on a prolonged hold in 2026 as inflation nears the 2% target[4].
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
